name: widget-generator
tagline: Scaffolds widget plugin files (standard or custom-render) for the prompts.chat feed and walks through registering and verifying them.
verdict: No security issues; concrete file targets, code templates, and a useful troubleshooting table for common failures. Gaps: no negative-trigger guidance, widget registration isn't idempotent (duplicate entries on re-run), the Next.js/TypeScript dependency is assumed rather than declared, several example catalogs could move to an on-demand reference file, and.

highlights.summary: Description states what the skill does (generate widget plugins) but never phrases when a dispatching agent should trigger it.
No 'NOT for' or out-of-scope guidance anywhere in the description or body.

Positioning Examples, shouldInject Examples, and Custom Render Patterns sections are inline catalogs that could be split into an on-demand reference file, though the file stays under the hard size cei
